name: Micro_Aroon_Oscillator_Alpha_Scalper
description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture high-velocity structural pivots in the VN30F1M contract while isolating execution from horizontal chop. It tracks short-term cyclical turning points using a hyper-short Aroon Oscillator threshold. To protect against fakeouts during compressed sideways regimes and entirely side-step division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion trigger where the immediate standard deviation breaks past a medium-term moving baseline. Vectorized loop-free exits are executed array-wise using tight rolling channels based on historical extremes.

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (close < Micro_Low) or (Aroon_Osc < 0.0). Exit Short: (close > Micro_High) or (Aroon_Osc > 0.0).
